---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement to this repository
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature request

### Summary

Describe the proposed improvement clearly and briefly.

### Motivation

Explain why this feature would be useful.

### Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

### Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

### Additional context

Add examples, references, or related issues if helpful.
